title: Welcome to 4kwallpaper
subtitle: Your first post on the platform
content:
Welcome to 4kwallpaper! This is your first post. You can create new posts by adding JSON files to the posts folder in your GitHub repository.

Each post is stored directly in GitHub, making it easy to version control your content and deploy updates instantly.

To create a new post:

1. Go to the posts folder
2. Create a new .json file
3. Add your title, subtitle, and content
4. Commit and push to GitHub

Your post will appear immediately on the website! The feed uses a Medium-style algorithm to show the most engaging posts based on views, freshness, and discovery randomness.

Thanks for using 4kwallpaper!
